name: asia_london_range_break_xau_m5_v2
hypothesis: After a compressed Asia range (measured 00:00-06:00 UTC), XAUUSD expands directionally in the London session; a breakout beyond the Asia extreme with ATR-normalized body confirmation yields a tradable edge. Previous-gen zero-trade defect is addressed by loosening range ATR bounds, widening London window, and removing first-breakout-only lock.

signals.entry_long: bar_time in 07:00-12:00 UTC AND close > asia_high AND (close-asia_high) >= 0.3*atr(14) AND bar_body >= 0.8*atr(14)
signals.entry_short: bar_time in 07:00-12:00 UTC AND close < asia_low AND (asia_low-close) >= 0.3*atr(14) AND bar_body >= 0.8*atr(14)

rules: breakout must occur within first 18 M5 bars of London window (was 9)
max 2 trades per day per direction
regime_filter.skip_when: range outside bounds OR outside London window OR daily trade cap hit

exits.sl: opposite side of asia range OR 1.2*atr(14), whichever is tighter
exits.time_stop: close at 16:00 UTC if still open
exits.trailing: move SL to breakeven after +1.0*atr profit; then trail at 2*atr
